title: hieracium schultesii subsp. soleirolianum
intro: Hieracium schultesii subsp. soleirolianum, also known as Hieracium soleirolii, is a lesser-known species of hawkweed, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium schultesii subsp. soleirolianum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often combined with other plants and used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to support overall health and well-being.
